description: The same wall (identical offer) surfaces across two openings. Fire #1 useful; fire #2 suppressed by back-off → only one fire counted.

timeline.speaker: A
timeline.text: What was the vendor's name again?

timeline.text: Hmm, still can't recall the vendor.

candidates.label: useful
